Make an
impact today

When you choose to give, you become part of something bigger—
something powerful.

What your gift makes possible

CBIO Initiatives for Global Health runs on volunteer effort — our board serves without pay — so contributions go straight into materials we create and share freely with the world. Gifts fund short explainer videos, self-paced courses in English and French, an open online library of CBIO resources, a ready-to-teach toolkit for university faculty, and hands-on support for field practitioners preparing their CBIO+ results for publication.

Our application for recognition as a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) charity has been filed with the IRS. Approval, once granted, applies retroactively to the organization’s founding, so gifts made today are expected to qualify as tax-deductible. We will confirm the final determination on this page, and we provide a receipt for every donation. Please consult your tax advisor about your own situation.

To support the work of CBIO-IGH, please make your check payable to CBIO Initiatives for Global Health and send it to the following address:

2 Elam Court
Durham, NC 27705, USA

To give by direct bank transfer, write to hperry@cbioinitiativesforglobalhealth.org and we will send you the banking details.

Thank you for standing with communities as they take charge of their own health.

Donate Today

An online giving option is on its way. Until then, every check mailed and every transfer made moves this work forward — thank you.
